emails.subject: Jay Bee Oil & Gas
emails.body: Jay Bee Oil Gas The only paper I find for JB is a GTC dated 4/1/00. Could it be under a different name? Please advise. Thanks Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490

emails.subject: Re: Jay Bee Oil & Gas
emails.body: Re: Jay Bee Oil Gas I am faxing a copy of the JayBee agreement. The correct name is Jay-Bee Production Company. He calls it Jay-Bee Oil and Gas during phone conversations, and that name may have been inadvertantly used. Jim

emails.subject: Re: Jay Bee Oil & Gas
emails.body: Re: Jay Bee Oil Gas Thank you, the agreement is here as "Jaybee". Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490
